title: The Blood Forest Visual assets
description: This is just a resource pack for visuals from the blood forest for backgrounds and the main menu.
body:
This resource pack includes a panorama from the mod The Blood Forest and is just a visual thing, I can add more in the future but its quite simple really.

![main menu screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/afe830ea05a6fb5addc40634c9e370f6d2687b72.png)
